glossaryEntries.definition: Forces the target to launch its Basic Attack against the dragon that applied Taunt.

abilities.name: Lure
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: 25% chance to afflict Taunt on three enemies for two rounds; odd-numbered rounds: deal Physical Damage to two adjacent enemies, Damage Rate +45%. Taunt roll scope is not stated.

activationRoll.description: Taunt chance applies to three targets, but shared versus per-target roll scope is not stated.
Shared versus per-target Taunt roll is unresolved.

notes: Mitigated by each target Instinct.
Two distinct eligible targets; repeated same-target selection is not modeled.

abilities.name: Warrior's Resilience
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Vaeldra Damage Received -8%; Left Flank ally Tactical Damage Dealt +16%.

abilities.name: Dragon's Valor
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: reduce Vaeldra Damage Received and increase Strength.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.rawDescription: Round 1 for three rounds: reduce Instinct and Initiative of two adjacent enemies, enhanced by Vaeldra Intelligence.

references.description: Initiative reduction uses the enemies selected for Instinct reduction.

abilities.name: Tempting Distraction
abilities.rawDescription: When Vaeldra successfully afflicts an enemy with Taunt: increase that same target's non-Basic Physical Damage Received and Fire Damage Received for two rounds.

glossaryEntries.definition: Control status that prevents Attack Modifier Commands and Basic Attacks on the target's turn.

abilities.name: Siren's Call
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1: reduce self Physical Damage Received for three rounds. Start of Rounds 1-3: 40%-100% chance to apply Taunt to each non-Taunted enemy or Stagger to each already Taunted enemy until end of round; roll scope is not stated.

activationRoll.description: Shared schedule versus independent per-target activation roll is not stated.

effectOptions.description: For each affected target, apply exactly one branch based on whether Taunt is already present.

notes: Vaeldra command, trait, affinity, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from supplied screenshot evidence.
Siren's Call uses conditional effect options so a target receives either Taunt or Stagger, never both from one activation.
Tempting Distraction is modeled as a successful-Taunt same-target trigger and preserves non-Basic Physical source scope.
Observation values are account-specific and are not canonical base stats.
Requires Dragon Level 16+.
Unlocked in observed account collection state, subject to level and star requirements.
